description: Odoo Community / Enterprise / SaaS security patterns: XML-RPC / JSON-RPC credentials, per-user API keys, master password, and module-install red flags.

token_patterns.name: Odoo Master Password (admin_passwd)
token_patterns.notes: admin_passwd in odoo.conf gates the database-manager — create / drop / restore. Leak = full DB control.

token_patterns.name: Odoo XML-RPC URL with credentials in code
token_patterns.notes: Detects an inline call passing db, uid, username, password to execute_kw — hard-coded creds shape.

misconfigurations.title: admin_passwd left at default `admin` or empty
misconfigurations.rationale: Default master password is the canonical Odoo internet-exposure incident.
misconfigurations.fix: Set `admin_passwd = <long-random>` in odoo.conf; disable the DB manager in prod via `list_db = False` and a proxy block on `/web/database/*`.

misconfigurations.title: /web/database/manager reachable from the internet
misconfigurations.rationale: Allows arbitrary database creation/restore and effectively a privileged backdoor.

misconfigurations.title: TOTP/2FA not enforced for admin users
misconfigurations.rationale: Odoo admin compromise leads to data theft and module backdoor install.
misconfigurations.fix: Settings > Users & Companies > Users > require 2FA on the admin group via auth_totp_mail_enforce or the Enterprise enforcement module.

misconfigurations.title: Installing third-party modules from outside the official store without review
misconfigurations.rationale: Odoo modules execute Python on the server with DB-level access — supply-chain risk.
misconfigurations.fix: Pin module versions in addons_path via Git submodules; require code review before install.

admin_red_flags.title: Developer mode enabled on production
admin_red_flags.rationale: Exposes /web/login redirect tricks, eval-style fields, and direct ORM editor.
admin_red_flags.signal: Web server log: `/web?debug=1` or `/web?debug=assets` on prod URL.

admin_red_flags.title: Module installation event by a non-IT principal
admin_red_flags.signal: ir.module.module write events outside the IT admin group.

admin_red_flags.title: Database backup or restore via /web/database/manager
admin_red_flags.rationale: Backup = full data exfil; restore = pivot tenant content.
admin_red_flags.signal: Web server log: POST to /web/database/backup or /web/database/restore.

admin_red_flags.title: List-view export of > 5k records by unusual principal
admin_red_flags.rationale: Built-in export icon is the easiest exfil path.
